line_preview: # Please do not remove any comments from this file, but feel free to add as many

# "Study 1: Replication of Poliseno et al., 2010 (Nature)", should be
#@ Original Study Title: Biomechanical remodeling of the microenvironment by stromal caveolin-1 favors tumor invasion and metastasis
#@ eLife link to Registered Report: https://elifesciences.org/articles/04796
#@ eLife link to Replication Study: https://elifesciences.org/articles/45120
#@ Experiment and Effect Numbers: Experiment 1 (4 effects)

#In the function download.OSF.file, 'RPCB_private_access' is an object that contains the private viewing link or a private access token
#which is necessary to view and create scripts while this project is private. Upon publication, when the project is made public,
#a private access token or private link will no longer be necessary.
#@ NOTE: Data must be loaded from OSF directly and NOT rely on any local files.
